description:
As a librarian
  I want to add books and members to the system
  So that the catalog and membership can grow

elements.name: Create a new book

steps.name: the librarian creates a book with title "Neuromancer", author "William Gibson", ISBN "978-0441569595", and 4 copies
the response includes the book with title "Neuromancer"

elements.name: Create a book with duplicate ISBN

steps.name: the librarian creates a book with ISBN "978-0441569595"
the response contains error "ISBN already exists"

elements.name: Create a new member

steps.name: the librarian creates a member with name "Alice Smith" and email "alice@example.com"
the response includes the member with email "alice@example.com"

elements.name: Create a member with duplicate email

steps.name: the librarian creates a member with email "alice@example.com"

name: Add books and members

description:
As a librarian
  I want to see the catalog of books
  So that I can view availability and book details

elements.name: List all books sorted by title

steps.name: the librarian requests the book list
the books are sorted by title case-insensitively
each book includes title, author, ISBN, total_copies, and available_copies

elements.name: Get a single book with reservation queue depth

steps.name: the librarian requests the detail for book "Dune"

elements.name: Request a non-existent book

steps.name: the librarian requests the detail for a non-existent book ID
the response contains error "Book not found"

name: View the catalog

description:
As a librarian
  I want to collect fines from members
  So that penalties are tracked and resolved

elements.name: Member profile includes unpaid fines total

steps.name: the member "Alice" has unpaid fines of $3.50
the librarian views the profile for "Alice"

elements.name: Pay a fine

steps.name: the member "Alice" has unpaid fines of $3.50
the fine is marked as paid

elements.name: Pay an already-paid fine

steps.name: the member "Alice" has a paid fine
the librarian pays the fine again
the response contains error "Fine already paid"

name: Collect fines

description:
As a librarian
  I want to lend a book to a member
  So that members can borrow books from the library

elements.name: Successfully borrow a book

steps.name: the loan has a due date 14 days from now

elements.name: Reject loan when member has 5 active loans

steps.name: the response contains error "Loan limit reached"

elements.name: Reject loan when member is suspended

steps.name: the response contains error "Member is suspended"

elements.name: Reject loan when member has unpaid fines over $5

steps.name: the member "Alice" has unpaid fines of $6.00
the response contains error "Outstanding fines exceed limit"

elements.name: Reject loan when no copies available

steps.name: all copies of "Dune" are on loan
the response contains error "No copies available — reserve instead"

elements.name: Notified member can borrow a reserved book

steps.name: all copies of "Dune" are on loan
the member "Alice" has a notified reservation for "Dune"
the reservation for "Alice" on "Dune" is fulfilled

elements.name: Non-notified member cannot borrow reserved book

steps.name: all copies of "Dune" are on loan
the member "Alice" has a notified reservation for "Dune"
the response contains error "Book is reserved for another member"

name: Lend a book to a member

description:
As a librarian
  I want members to reserve unavailable books
  So that they are notified when copies become available

elements.name: Create a reservation for an unavailable book

steps.name: all copies of "Dune" are on loan

elements.name: Cannot reserve a book already on loan by the member

steps.name: the response contains error "Member already has this book on loan"

elements.name: Cannot create a duplicate reservation

steps.name: all copies of "Dune" are on loan
the member "Alice" has a waiting reservation for "Dune"

elements.name: Expire stale reservations

steps.name: all copies of "Dune" are on loan
the member "Alice" has a notified reservation for "Dune" that expired 1 hour ago
the member "Bob" has a waiting reservation for "Dune"

name: Reserve unavailable books

description:
As a librarian
  I want to record book returns and calculate late fines
  So that books are returned to circulation and penalties are applied

elements.name: Return a book on time

steps.name: the librarian returns the loan for "Dune"
the loan is marked as returned

elements.name: Return a book late creates a fine

steps.name: the member "Alice" has borrowed "Dune" with due date 0 days ago
the librarian returns the loan for "Dune"
the member "Alice" has a fine of 0 cents

elements.name: Return a book late creates a fine

steps.name: the member "Alice" has borrowed "Dune" with due date 1 days ago
the librarian returns the loan for "Dune"
the member "Alice" has a fine of 50 cents

elements.name: Return a book late creates a fine

steps.name: the member "Alice" has borrowed "Dune" with due date 10 days ago
the librarian returns the loan for "Dune"
the member "Alice" has a fine of 500 cents

elements.name: Return a book late creates a fine

steps.name: the member "Alice" has borrowed "Dune" with due date 20 days ago
the librarian returns the loan for "Dune"
the member "Alice" has a fine of 1000 cents

elements.name: Return a book late creates a fine

steps.name: the member "Alice" has borrowed "Dune" with due date 21 days ago
the librarian returns the loan for "Dune"
the member "Alice" has a fine of 1000 cents

elements.name: Return an already-returned loan

steps.name: the member "Alice" has borrowed and returned "Dune"
the librarian returns the loan for "Dune" again
the response contains error "Loan already returned"

elements.name: Return triggers reservation notification

steps.name: all copies of "Dune" are on loan
the member "Alice" is waiting in the reservation queue for "Dune"
the reservation has an expiry 48 hours from now

elements.name: Member profile shows active loans and fines

steps.name: the librarian views the profile for "Alice"
the profile shows the active loan for "Dune"
the profile shows the due date

name: Record returns and fines
